query:
UPDATE auctions
            SET    winner_bid_id = (
                SELECT id
                FROM   bids
                WHERE  auction_id    = $1
                  AND  is_valid      = true
                  AND  reveal_amount IS NOT NULL
                ORDER BY reveal_amount DESC,
                         commit_at    ASC,
                         bidder_id    ASC
                LIMIT 1
            )
            WHERE id = $1
              AND winner_bid_id IS NULL
